title: picramnia pentandra
intro: Picramnia pentandra, also known as quassia amara or quassia, is a tropical plant species native to Central and South America. It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include analgesic, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of quassia include relief from digestive issues, fever reduction, and pain management, making it a popular natural remedy for various ailments. Herbal preparations of quassia can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, often used in folk medicine to treat a range of conditions.
